title: RBI Tightens Non-Performing Asset (NPA) Classification Norms - April 2026
description: <cite index="17-1,17-3">New NPA norms issued in April 2026 will be implemented from April 1, 2027, with a transition period extending up to March 31, 2030</cite>. <cite index="17-17,17-18">The key change is borrower-level classification where if any one loan of a borrower becomes a Non-Performing Asset, then all other loans of that borrower will also be treated as Non-Performing Assets</cite>.
